chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 1115 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case. 1.For orders on M.A No. 5620/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection ‘A’ 3. For orders on M.A No. 5621/2025 (C/A) 4. For Hearing of main case. 23.10.2025. Mr. Muzafar Ali Wadhio, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional A.G. --------------- At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner would approach the competent forum for transfer and posting as per wedlock policy and under instructions, he does not press this petition which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge Abid H. Qazi/**
